chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No. D- 1341 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 25.01.2024. Mr. Wajid Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Uzair Sheikh, Advocate for Respondents Nos. 2 & 3. Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General. -.-.-.--.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner has been verbally terminated from his job and he has filed an application before Respondent No.2 / General Manager (HR) Pakistan State Oil Company Limited, Karachi. If the said authority is directed to decide the said application within a reasonable time, he will be satisfied and will not press the petition. Learned Assistant Attorney General has accepted the above proposal. Accordingly, the petition is disposed of as not pressed. However, Respondent No.2 /General Manager (HR) Pakistan State Oil Limited Karachi is directed to decide the application of the petitioner, if filed, by him, preferably within a period of two months. Petition is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Irfan/PA
